supported_devices: LED grow lights, EC fans, inline fans, clip fans, heaters, humidifiers, dehumidifiers, water pumps, any 230V device
compatible_ec_fans: Spider Farmer HEXA fans, GGS inline fans with RJ12 port; any fan via AC outlet
compatible_lights: Spider Farmer SF series (excl. SF300, SF600), G series, SE series; any light via AC outlet
compatible_sensors: Spider Farmer GGS temp/humidity/light sensor (included), GGS 3-in-1 soil sensor (included, measures VWC/soil temp/EC), optional GGS SensorPro
compatible_irrigation: any irrigation pump via AC outlet
compatible_co2_equipment: any CO2 device via AC outlet; CO2 control mode requires optional CO2 sensor
supported_manufacturer_series: SF series, G series, SE series, HEXA series fans
recommended_use_note: Ideal for 3x3 ft (90x90 cm) grow tents and smaller; 5 independently controllable Schuko outlets; operates standalone without separate GGS Controller
uvp_notes: Regular retail price at GoGrow.de; official Spider Farmer EU price not confirmed directly
notes: EU version ships from Germany warehouse with Schuko outlets (220V). Kit includes GGS temp/humidity/light sensor and 3-in-1 soil sensor (VWC, soil temp, EC). CO2 control mode requires optional CO2 sensor. EU max load 10A per GoGrow; verify against manufacturer EU datasheet. RJ12 ports enable smart speed/oscillation control for compatible fans and dimming for compatible lights.
